## Admin checklist

- [ ] `manifest.json` is valid
- [ ] `manifest.iconUrl` is usable as the store icon
- [ ] source was reviewed at the exact commit above
- [ ] `store/index.json` entry pins `approvedCommitSha` to the exact commit above
